column1: hey what's up Lola its Spiffy from Spring Break U. saw you started a reservation from our quote, were you lookin to get things started?
our next step would be to make a reservation specific to your group
hey did you still need help with sprin f break or you all set?
yoo what's up Lola it's Spiffy from Spring Break U. hope summer went smooth
y'all lookin to plan anything for spring break this school year?
hey spiffy!!! def but idk what yet
Okay cool! I can send some things over, few options you can all look at
Do you know which week your spring break is?
okay dope. I'll send a few options right now
you all back on campus now?
dope. hope everythings going good first few days in
which email should I send the spring break info to?
hey! dope gonna send right now
just sent that over, lmk if it came through
hey spiffy, do you have any recs for aruba spring break
What's up! I don't have much for Aruba off head but can have the operations team find some things for you. How many ppl we thinkin and did you have a ballpark on how much you're looking to spend?
hey lola, got a feel for what y'all wanna spend on the aruba trip? thatll help me find the best option
Im not exactly sure. We also are interested in Cabo
word, honestly cabo is where its at this year. everyones been asking for it
oh fun! im not sure what our budget is but its about the same as last year i think. whatever that was/
word I see. yea we can get you hooked up with that week too
Our spring break is the 1-8 but they haven't announced week one yet
ill send you our pricing for that week, youll be able to attend the events
and itll be a little cheaper through us
thanks you rock. i'll talk to my girls
bet! lmk what they think. the pricing you see there is a little discounted to for y'all too
whats good Lola! hows everyone feelin about the cabo package so far
we are still thinking but excited
are we debating possibly not cabo?
not exactly sure about anything. we just need to get together and all talk
I hear you. All good, let me know how things are shaking out, here to help
If there are any other spots y'all want to see lmk
hey Lola hows everyone feelin about spring break?
heyy whats up, you still looking for help with spring break or you good
Hi spiffy! Im meeting with my friends right now!
hey okay dope. anything you need me to send over?

We are thinking about Aruba, Cabo, or Bahamas. Do you have any recs. our spring break is feb 28th - march 8 we are preferably looking to go in the beginning of the break. we also want to do a 4 night stay!
Do you know how long it would take for estimates on these]
I can grab Cabo and Bahamas right now! Aruba is def more on the expensive side
its not really a college spring break destination
more of an exploratory spring break
Yeah fs. My family loves going there.
Im gonna look for Nassau rn
I have a 5 night Nassau example, https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/FOMNNKJ1FQ the 4 night will be $699
Are all of these all inclusive?
yup. the nassau one lemme triple confirm
The coral Atlantis in Nassau isn't all inclusive
Ok, we really like the idea of Nassau but we want an all inclusive
I'll see what else I can find that's all inclusive
hey morning! I have another option for Nassau thats perfect for you
It's Breezes Bahamas in Nassau. All-inclusive $884 per person for the 4 person room, 4 night stay. wanna run this one?
Le encantó “hey morning! I have another option for Nassau thats perfect for you”
word lets do it! i'll make the reservation rn
was the rest of the group ready for today?
heyy whats up, hows everything lookin on your end?
sup Lola when did y'all want to reserve the Nassau option
heyy checkin in, we still wanting to lock in that Nassau option?
We def want to we just need some time to talk still
gotchu. just don't want prices to change on us before you get in
Liked “gotchu. just don't want prices to change on us before you get in”
hey Lola whats up, how have convo's been so far?
heyy checkin in, prices are starting to go up, you guys still lookin to get situated?
yes we are. we are looking to book within a few days
Heard you. Hmu this weekend and we'll get you situated
whts good Lola did we want to set things up for tomorrow
hey Lola whats up, did we wanna secure that Nassau option?
sup! We still lookin to get situated for spring break?
hey checkin in, squad still looking to lock in that option?
whats up Lola did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
yoo Lola did y'all get to book anything for spring break yet
Not yet but we are looking to book soon
okay bet! lmk if I can help get you situated
bet bet. yea things are starting to sell out for Nassau. we have the Breezes all inclusive option that got popular the last month or so
can you resend the price break downs
so we got March 2-6 and March 2-7 available for your week
here are the price breakdowns per range, 5 nights - https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/Y7J87XL4OF
heres a reference for the 4 nights, disregard the dates in the link, it would be March 2-6 https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/OCLAQSKODC
We are interested in the 2-6. It does different dates tho when we click on the link
All good, that's just a sample link. I mentioned above
If we book a room of like 2 or 3 could we add someone later
also we are all ready to book
yea we can add ppl later on as long as we have the availability
and okay bet ill set up the reservation right now. March 2-6, Nassau, how many ppl as of now? I'll make all the slots we need
two rooms of four are definitely happening. one room will either be two or three people
Le encantó “yea we can add ppl later on as long as we have the availability”
word ill set the two up for now
Thank you for all your help spiffy!
were y'all able to get onto the reservation
Yes! How long is the link available for?
Sorry, is there any excursions like a booze cruise available. I couldn't find it on the buy add ons tab
Yea those are honestly easier to get on site when you get there with our on site staff at check in
There's a booze cruise and a party pass for 3 nightclubs in Nassau
hey… One room of girls can't pay tonight because they have to get a new credit card card. If the rest of us book our room is it still possible for us to be rooms next to each other.
Yo! Yea it's all good, when can she pay by
Also rooms being right next to eachother is something we can't guarantee. Depends what's available at the time of check in and check outs
During that time is when you can request same floor, same building, next to eachother if available, etc etc
are there rooms that are for 5 people at all?
she's willing to pay as much as the portion for a three person room
unfortunately the max occupancy is 4 in a room
yea we can do a diff type of arrangement maybe. move some ppl around
Le gustó “yea we can do a diff type of arrangement maybe. move some ppl around”
hey, could we make it 3 rooms of three?
did you have one more person hopping in?
cool are they ready to hop in right now?
theyll have to pay the full amount when creating the account
ok, what ahout the rest of us
theres will be a small balance of $40 on the occupancy change. going from the 4 person room rate to the 3 person rate
lmk if everyone is cool with that and then I'll put the request in
Yes it is we talked to all the girls
We will be meeting up tonight around 8 to finalize
cool lmk when y'all meet up and i'll get the reservation adjusted then
would it just be an account balance on our accounts or do we have to switch things manually
It'll just be an account balance. Just lmk when they're ready to be added
aight cool, whos going into the third room?
lola. kiana and ellie (she's being added)
got it so whos gonna go with kath and hannah
Emma is in there for now. ellie can hop on and get situated rn
they just texted back it's gonna be abby in there
how does the new girl access it
same way she can follow this link
yo Lola! can you let Emma know to add her flight info onto her account so we can get y'all finalized
is she on the same flight as you?
yes i'll text her right now
word ill add it for her
Loved “word ill add it for her”
